data.title: Heineken Holding N.V. discloses transactions under its ongoing share repurchase plan. #stockbuyback #investing
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global unemployment rate has decreased to 5.7% in the third quarter of 2021, marking a significant improvement from the previous year. The number of unemployed individuals has fallen to 200 million, showing a positive trend in the labor market. Additionally, it is noted that youth unemployment remains a concern, with 13.6% of young people worldwide facing joblessness. The pandemic's impact on employment is evident, with the report highlighting that 125 million full-time jobs were lost in 2020. However, the recovery seems to be underway, with part-time employment increasing by 9.2% in the third quarter of this year. These statistics indicate a gradual but positive shift in global employment dynamics, bringing hope for a more stable job market in the near future.

data.title: Montage Gold making progress on Koné Project, 63% capital committed, first gold pour late Q4-2026, Ball mill shell delivery.
data.description: Remaining on budget with 63% of the total capital already committed, a ball mill shell has been successfully delivered to the site. The focus on exploration activities remains strong, with no deviation from the original plan.

data.title: Inflection Resources finds 3m zone with 7.72 g/t gold in Trangie, NSW, plans 83 more drill holes under deal with AngloGold Ashanti.
data.description: Recent drilling activities in New South Wales, Australia have been successfully completed as per the Exploration Agreement with AngloGold Ashanti Australia Limited. A total of 35 boreholes were drilled, with an average depth of 800 meters. This exploration effort covered an area of 500 square kilometers and yielded promising results. The drilling revealed rich mineral deposits, with gold grades averaging 5 grams per ton. This successful exploration marks a significant milestone in the partnership between the two entities and highlights the region's potential for future mining opportunities.

data.title: Horizon Quantum and Alice & Bob collaborate to advance fault-tolerant quantum computing, boosting software development.
data.description: A collaboration has been announced between Horizon Quantum Computing Pte. Ltd. and Alice & Bob to enhance the development of fault-tolerant quantum computing software. Horizon Quantum specializes in software infrastructure for quantum applications while Alice & Bob is known for its fault-tolerant quantum computers. This partnership aims to combine their expertise and streamline the deployment of FTQC software. Through integrating A&B’s emulators with Triple Alpha, the collaboration seeks to advance quantum computing technology.
